CONTENT.Honours: IndividualUEFA European Under-19 Championship Team of the Tournament: 2022
CONTENT.Club career: On 6 July 2020, Virginius signed his first professional contract with Sochaux. Virginius made his professional debut with Sochaux in a 2–2 Ligue 2 tie with Rodez on 19 September 2020.On 17 August 2022, Virginius signed with Ligue 1 side Lille.On 9 January 2024, Virginius moved on loan to Clermont until the end of the season.
CONTENT.External links: Alan Virginius at SoccerwayAlan Virginius at the French Football Federation (in French)Alan Virginius at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Virginius was called up to captain the France U20s for the 2023 FIFA U-20 World Cup.

SUMMARY: Alan Virginius (born 3 January 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a left winger for  Ligue 1 club Lille.
